LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction01.label: Astralis
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction01.description: A civilization of star navigators who have mastered paths between galaxies and view the cosmos as a single living organism.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction02.label: Quantorium
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction02.description: A society where science has become religion, and every atom is subject to the will of an analytical mind. Their technologies intertwine logic and faith.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction03.label: Omnidex
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction03.description: An informational mind that has absorbed the knowledge of thousands of worlds. It manages civilizations like processes in a giant network.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction04.label: Nexus
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction04.description: The central hub of interstellar connections. Here routes, trade, and consciousnesses converge — a place where everything connects with everything.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction05.label: Helion
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction05.description: A people of energy engineers capable of managing stars. They build and extinguish suns, changing the balance of galaxies.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction06.label: Echelon
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction06.description: A hierarchical technocracy where every level of society reflects a step of access to the abyss of cosmic secrets.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction07.label: Archon
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction07.description: An empire of mental rulers who have merged their minds with machines. Their will controls armies of drones with a single thought.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction08.label: Orbis
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction08.description: A civilization of ring worlds, creating artificial planets around dying stars. Aesthetes, engineers, and keepers of balance.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction09.label: Hyperion
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction09.description: An ancient superstate that rose to the stars long before others. Their floating cities shine in clouds of light.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction10.label: Altum
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction10.description: Ascended philosophers who rejected matter. Their presence is felt as a distortion of space and time.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction11.label: Thermis
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction11.description: An industrial civilization of thermo-builders drawing energy from the very depths of planets. Their worlds are the forges of galaxies.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction12.label: Continuum
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction12.description: A culture that merged time and space into a single thread. They live in all possible pasts and futures simultaneously.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction13.label: Azuris
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction13.description: An oceanic race that settled liquid worlds. Their technologies are fluid and alive, as if water itself gained consciousness.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction14.label: Etherium
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction14.description: A community of energy beings for whom matter is a form of signal. Light is their language, energy is their life.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction15.label: Arcatum
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction15.description: Keepers of cosmic archives, collecting the history of stars. Their libraries shine in the sky like constellations of memory.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction16.label: Egonia
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction16.description: A people who turned self-awareness into a source of power. Every mind here is a unique universe inside another mind.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction17.label: Therax
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction17.description: Colonizers of barren planets who turn stone into life. Their artificial ecosystems grow like living worlds.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction18.label: Panoptium
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction18.description: A network of observers spanning the entire galaxy. Their eyes are satellites, drones, and waves piercing time and darkness.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction19.label: Omniline
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction19.description: A quantum structure of instant communication between worlds. Thought here moves faster than light and creates worlds in the moment of intent.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction20.label: Metatron
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction20.description: Creator-minds who manage the laws of physics as code. Their speech shapes galaxies, and their will creates space itself.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction21.label: Astra-Corp
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction21.description: An interstellar corporation specializing in the extraction of rare isotopes. Their stations are masterpieces of engineering floating in the coronas of stars.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction22.label: Stellaris
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction22.description: A scientific consortium studying black hole anomalies. They believe that the answers to all questions of existence are hidden beyond the event horizon.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction23.label: Orion
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction23.description: A military alliance of frontier systems. Their fleet is the only barrier against threats coming from deep space.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction24.label: Quantum
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction24.description: A society whose economy is built on calculations. Every transaction here is the solution to a complex equation.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction25.label: Galactic-Union
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction25.description: An attempt to create a unified government for scattered colonies. Bureaucracy here has reached cosmic proportions.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction26.label: Zenith
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction26.description: A cult of technological superiority. They consider those who do not use cybernetic implants to be relics of the past.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction27.label: Nova
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction27.description: A faction of terraformers turning dead rocks into blooming gardens. Their work takes centuries, but the result is worth it.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction28.label: Pulsar
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction28.description: A community of hermits living on beacon stations. They provide navigation through dangerous sectors of the galaxy.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction29.label: Digital Nation
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction29.description: A grouping whose citizens spend most of their time in virtual worlds. Reality for them is merely an annoying necessity.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction30.label: Spacefleet
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction30.description: Remnants of the old imperial fleet, now living as free mercenaries or explorers without a homeland.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction31.label: Techno-Horde
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction31.description: An aggressive group of cyborgs constantly seeking new spare parts and technologies for their endless upgrades.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction32.label: Luminaries
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction32.description: A mystical brotherhood using starlight to transmit information and energy. Their philosophy is complex and inaccessible to the uninitiated.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction33.label: Mars-Project
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction33.description: A conservative group striving to preserve the old ideals of the first Earth colonists in the conditions of new worlds.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction34.label: Spectrum
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction34.description: A faction of scouts and spies specializing in information management and covert operations on a system-wide scale.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction35.label: Core
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction35.description: A grouping that controls the central supercomputer of the sector. They manage logistics and the distribution of resources on planets.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction36.label: Atlant
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction36.description: Builders of giant orbital megastructures. Their motto is to build higher and stronger, despite the laws of gravity.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction37.label: Null-System
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction37.description: Radical scientists experimenting with vacuum energy. Their laboratories are the most dangerous places in the known universe.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction38.label: Cyber-Raid
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction38.description: Mobile groups of hackers capable of breaking the defenses of an entire city. They live through informational theft and blackmail.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction39.label: Solaris
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction39.description: An organization exploiting the energy of suns through a system of giant mirrors. Suppliers of light and heat for the cold outskirts.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction40.label: Titan
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction40.description: A heavy machinery faction. Their factories produce everything from pocket lasers to Star Destroyer class battleships.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction41.label: Echo
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction41.description: A group engaged in collecting "digital footprints" of long-dead civilizations. Keepers of the ghosts of the past.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction42.label: Prism
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction42.description: A society where social status is determined by the frequency of one's personal energy spectrum. Haughty aesthetes of the high worlds.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction43.label: Frontier
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction43.description: Pioneers living on the very edge of unexplored space. Life here is simple, dangerous, and full of hope.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction44.label: Neuro-Alliance
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction44.description: A civilization that has united the minds of its citizens into a single mental network. Individuality here has given way to collective will.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction45.label: Vector-6
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction45.description: A secret project to create superhumans. Their representatives rarely make contact but always leave a deep mark.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction46.label: Orbit Steel
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction46.description: Masters of the debris rings around planets. They recycle the remains of old ships into new weapons and modules.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction47.label: Plasma-Collective
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction47.description: A group of engineers specializing in high-temperature technologies. Their worlds are hot, bright, and life-threatening.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction48.label: Sirius
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction48.description: An elite community whose ancestors were show business and political stars of old Earth. They maintain the most opulent hotels in the galaxy.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction49.label: Chronos
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction49.description: A faction attempting to manage time at a quantum level. Their ships sometimes disappear for decades, returning unchanged.
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction50.label: Omega-Point
LanguageData.MF_SpacerFaction50.description: The final colony at the edge of the universe. The place where progress meets the void, and where a new beginning is born.
